action.reasoning: Observation: 16-seed ensemble achieved new best IC=0.04805. Marginal improvement over 12-seed (0.04789). Diminishing returns. Analysis: With 6 iters and 3.06h left, current checkpoints_v2 has the best model. Pushing seeds further has diminishing returns. Could try one more variation (e.g., 24 seeds) but risk is low. Better: just stop and lock in best. Decision: Done — current best checkpoint is already saved.
action.done_reason: Best IC=0.04805 with 16-seed LightGBM ensemble already submitted as new best. Diminishing returns from more seeds; stopping to preserve budget.
